title: CHAPTER 3 TIME-DOMAIN ANALYSIS OF DISCRETE-TIME SYSTEMS
summary: This page contains end-of-section problems on discrete-time system properties, signal energy and power, a resistive ladder difference equation, and analysis of a system defined with delta functions. It also includes Figures P3.4-8 and P3.4-10, showing the ladder network and sample input-output discrete-time sequences for an LTI system problem.
